002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.Constants.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
027
028import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.*;
029import org.apache.jena.riot.*;
030import org.apache.jena.util.iterator.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
038
039/**
040 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link RdfParser}.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
048
049 * </ul>
050 */
051@SuppressWarnings({
052   "java:S138",  // RDF parsing requires complex dispatch logic
053   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity - RDF graph traversal is inherently complex
054   "java:S6541", // Brain method - RDF graph-to-POJO conversion requires complex dispatch
055   "unchecked",  // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
056   "rawtypes"    // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
057})
058public class RdfParserSession extends ReaderParserSession {
059
060   /**
061    * Builder class.
062    */
063   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
064
065      private RdfParser ctx;
066
067      /**
068       * Constructor
069       *
070       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
071       */
072      protected Builder(RdfParser ctx) {
073         super(ctx);
074         this.ctx = ctx;
075      }
076
077      @Override
078      public RdfParserSession build() {
079         return new RdfParserSession(this);
080      }
081
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Creates a new builder for this object.
086    *
087    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
088    * @return A new builder.
089    */
090   public static Builder create(RdfParser ctx) {
091      return new Builder(ctx);
092   }
093
094   private final Model model;
095   private final org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Property pRoot;
096   private final org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Property pValue;
097   private final org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Property pType;
098   private final org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Property pRdfType;
099   private final Lang lang;
100   private final RdfParser ctx;
101   private final Set<Resource> urisVisited = new HashSet<>();
102
103   /**
104    * Constructor.
105    *
106    * @param builder The builder for this object.
107    */
108   protected RdfParserSession(Builder builder) {
109      super(builder);
110      ctx = builder.ctx;
111      model = ModelFactory.createDefaultModel();
112      addModelPrefix(ctx.getJuneauNs());
113      addModelPrefix(ctx.getJuneauBpNs());
114      pRdfType = model.createProperty("http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type");
115      pRoot = model.createProperty(ctx.getJuneauNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_ROOT);
116      pType = model.createProperty(ctx.getJuneauBpNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_TYPE);
117      pValue = model.createProperty(ctx.getJuneauNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_VALUE);
118
119      // Map legacy language names to RIOT Lang
120      var langName = ctx.getLanguage();
121      lang = toLang(langName);
122      if (lang == null)
123         throw new IllegalStateException("Unknown RDF language: " + langName);
124   }
125
126   private static Lang toLang(String langName) {
127      var lang = RDFLanguages.nameToLang(langName);
128      if (lang != null)
129         return lang;
130      if ("RDF/PROTO".equals(langName)) // HTT - not registered in Jena's RDFLanguages
131         return Lang.RDFPROTO;
132      return null;
133   }
134
135   private final void addModelPrefix(Namespace ns) {
136      model.setNsPrefix(ns.getName(), ns.getUri());
137   }
138
139   /*
140    * Decodes the specified string.
141    * If {@link RdfParser#RDF_trimWhitespace} is <jk>true</jk>, the resulting string is trimmed before decoding.
142    * If {@link #isTrimStrings()} is <jk>true</jk>, the resulting string is trimmed after decoding.
143    */
144   private String decodeString(Object o) {
145      if (o == null)
146         return null;
147      var s = o.toString();
148      if (s.isEmpty())
149         return s;
150      if (isTrimWhitespace())
151         s = s.trim();
152      s = XmlUtils.decode(s, null);
153      if (isTrimStrings())
154         s = s.trim();
155      return s;
156   }
157
158   /*
159    * Finds the roots in the model using either the "root" property to identify it,
160    *    or by resorting to scanning the model for all nodes with no incoming predicates.
161    */
162   private List<Resource> getRoots(Model m) {
163      var l = new LinkedList<Resource>();
164
165      // First try to find the root using the "http://www.apache.org/juneau/root" property.
166      var root = m.createProperty(getJuneauNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_ROOT);
167      for (ResIterator i = m.listResourcesWithProperty(root); i.hasNext();)
168         l.add(i.next());
169
170      if (! l.isEmpty())
171         return l;
172
173      // Otherwise, we need to find all resources that aren't objects.
174      // We want to explicitly ignore statements where the subject
175      // and object are the same node.
176      var objects = new HashSet<RDFNode>();
177      for (StmtIterator i = m.listStatements(); i.hasNext();) {
178         var st = i.next();
179         var subject = st.getSubject();
180         var object = st.getObject();
181         if (object.isResource() && ! object.equals(subject))
182            objects.add(object);
183      }
184      for (ResIterator i = m.listSubjects(); i.hasNext();) {
185         var r = i.next();
186         if (! objects.contains(r))
187            l.add(r);
188      }
189      return l;
190   }
191
192   private Object getValue(RDFNode n, Object outer) throws ParseException {
193      if (n.isLiteral())
194         return n.asLiteral().getValue();
195      if (n.isResource()) {
196         var st = n.asResource().getProperty(pValue);
197         if (nn(st)) {
198            n = st.getObject();
199            if (n.isLiteral())
200               return n.asLiteral().getValue();
201            return parseAnything(object(), st.getObject(), outer, null);
202         }
203      }
204      throw new ParseException(this, "Unknown value type for node ''{0}''", n);
205   }
206
207   private boolean isBag(RDFNode n) {
208      if (n.isResource()) {
209         var st = n.asResource().getProperty(pRdfType);
210         if (nn(st))
211            return RDF_BAG.equals(st.getResource().getURI());
212      }
213      return false;
214   }
215
216   private boolean isMultiValuedCollections(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) {
217      var bpRdf = getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
218
219      if (bpRdf.getCollectionFormat() != RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT)
220         return bpRdf.getCollectionFormat() == RdfCollectionFormat.MULTI_VALUED;
221
222      return getCollectionFormat() == RdfCollectionFormat.MULTI_VALUED;
223   }
224
225   private boolean isSeq(RDFNode n) {
226      if (n.isResource()) {
227         var st = n.asResource().getProperty(pRdfType);
228         if (nn(st))
229            return RDF_SEQ.equals(st.getResource().getURI());
230      }
231      return false;
232   }
233
234   private <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<?> eType, RDFNode n, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws ParseException {
235
236      if (eType == null)
237         eType = object();
238      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
239      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
240      ClassMeta<?> sType;
241      if (nn(builder))
242         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
243      else if (nn(swap))
244         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
245      else
246         sType = eType;
247
248      if (sType.isOptional())
249         return (T)opt(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), n, outer, pMeta));
250
251      setCurrentClass(sType);
252
253      if (! sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) && n.isResource()) {
254         var st = n.asResource().getProperty(pType);
255         if (nn(st)) {
256            var c = st.getLiteral().getString();
257            var tcm = getClassMeta(c, pMeta, eType);
258            if (nn(tcm))
259               sType = eType = tcm;
260         }
261      }
262
263      Object o = null;
264      if (n.isResource() && nn(n.asResource().getURI()) && n.asResource().getURI().equals(RDF_NIL)) {
265         // Do nothing.  Leave o == null.
266      } else if (sType.isObject()) {
267         if (n.isLiteral()) {
268            o = n.asLiteral().getValue();
269            if (o instanceof String o2) {
270               o = decodeString(o2);
271            }
272         } else if (n.isResource()) {
273            var r = n.asResource();
274            if (! urisVisited.add(r))
275               o = r.getURI();
276            else if (nn(r.getProperty(pValue))) {
277               o = parseAnything(object(), n.asResource().getProperty(pValue).getObject(), outer, null);
278            } else if (isSeq(r)) {
279               o = new JsonList(this);
280               parseIntoCollection(r.as(Seq.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
281            } else if (isBag(r)) {
282               o = new JsonList(this);
283               parseIntoCollection(r.as(Bag.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
284            } else if (r.canAs(RDFList.class)) {
285               o = new JsonList(this);
286               parseIntoCollection(r.as(RDFList.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
287            } else {
288               // If it has a URI and no child properties, we interpret this as an
289               // external resource, and convert it to just a URL.
290               var uri = r.getURI();
291               if (nn(uri) && ! r.listProperties().hasNext()) {
292                  o = r.getURI();
293               } else {
294                  var m2 = new JsonMap(this);
295                  parseIntoMap(r, m2, null, null, pMeta);
296                  o = cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
297               }
298            }
299         } else {
300            throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized node type ''{0}'' for object", n);
301         }
302      } else if (nn(builder)) {
303         var r = n.asResource();
304         if (! urisVisited.add(r))
305            return null;
306         var bm = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
307         o = builder.build(this, parseIntoBeanMap(r, bm).getBean(), eType);
308      } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
309         var r = n.asResource();
310         if (! urisVisited.add(r))
311            return null;
312         var bm = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
313         o = parseIntoBeanMap(r, bm).getBean();
314      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
315         var r = n.asResource();
316         if (! urisVisited.add(r))
317            return null;
318         var m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
319         o = parseIntoMap(r, m, eType.getKeyType(), eType.getValueType(), pMeta);
320      } else if (sType.isCollectionOrArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
321         if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs())
322            o = list();
323         else
324            o = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection<?>)sType.newInstance(outer) : new JsonList(this));
325         var r = n.asResource();
326         if (! urisVisited.add(r))
327            return null;
328         if (isSeq(r)) {
329            parseIntoCollection(r.as(Seq.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
330         } else if (isBag(r)) {
331            parseIntoCollection(r.as(Bag.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
332         } else if (r.canAs(RDFList.class)) {
333            parseIntoCollection(r.as(RDFList.class), (Collection)o, sType, pMeta);
334         } else {
335            throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized node type ''{0}'' for collection", n);
336         }
337         if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs())
338            o = toArray(sType, (Collection)o);
339      } else if (sType.isCharSequence()) {
340         o = decodeString(getValue(n, outer));
341      } else if (sType.isChar()) {
342         o = parseCharacter(decodeString(getValue(n, outer)));
343      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
344         o = parseNumber(getValue(n, outer).toString(), (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
345      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
346         o = convertToType(getValue(n, outer), boolean.class);
347      } else if (sType.isUri() && n.isResource()) {
348         // RDF URIs must be reconstructed from the resource's URI string (not from a literal),
349         // so this branch is kept here to fire before the temporal/scalar coercion fallbacks.
350         o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, decodeString(n.asResource().getURI()));
351      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
352         o = parseDate(getValue(n, outer).toString(), sType);
353      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
354         o = parseCalendar(getValue(n, outer).toString(), sType);
355      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
356         o = parseTemporal(getValue(n, outer).toString(), sType);
357      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
358         o = parseDuration(getValue(n, outer).toString());
359      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
360         o = parsePeriod(getValue(n, outer).toString());
361      } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer)) {
362         o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, decodeString(getValue(n, outer)));
363      } else if (n.isResource()) {
364         var r = n.asResource();
365         var m = newGenericMap(sType);
366         parseIntoMap(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
367         if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
368            o = cast((MarshalledMap)m, pMeta, eType);
369         else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
370            o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
371         else
372            throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
373      } else {
374         throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
375      }
376
377      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
378         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
379
380      if (nn(outer))
381         setParent(eType, o, outer);
382
383      return (T)o;
384   }
385
386   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBeanMap(Resource r2, BeanMap<T> m) throws ParseException {
387      var bm = m.getMeta();
388      var rbm = getRdfBeanMeta(bm);
389      if (rbm.hasBeanUri() && nn(r2.getURI()))
390         rbm.getBeanUriProperty().set(m, null, r2.getURI());
391      for (StmtIterator i = r2.listProperties(); i.hasNext();) {
392         var st = i.next();
393         var p = st.getPredicate();
394         var key = decodeString(p.getLocalName());
395         var pMeta = m.getPropertyMeta(key);
396         setCurrentProperty(pMeta);
397         if (nn(pMeta)) {
398            var o = st.getObject();
399            var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
400            if (cm.isCollectionOrArray() && isMultiValuedCollections(pMeta)) {
401               var et = cm.getElementType();
402               var value = parseAnything(et, o, m.getBean(false), pMeta);
403               setName(et, value, key);
404               try {
405                  pMeta.add(m, key, value);
406               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
407                  onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
408                  throw e;
409               }
410            } else {
411               var value = parseAnything(cm, o, m.getBean(false), pMeta);
412               setName(cm, value, key);
413               try {
414                  pMeta.set(m, key, value);
415               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
416                  onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
417                  throw e;
418               }
419            }
420         } else if (! (p.equals(pRoot) || p.equals(pType))) {
421            var o = st.getObject();
422            var value = parseAnything(object(), o, m.getBean(false), null);
423            onUnknownProperty(key, m, value);
424         }
425         setCurrentProperty(null);
426      }
427      return m;
428   }
429
430   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(Container c, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws ParseException {
431      int argIndex = 0;
432      for (NodeIterator ni = c.iterator(); ni.hasNext();) {
433         // HTT: isArgs() requires method-argument list ClassMeta; not reachable through public parse() API.
434         E e = (E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), ni.next(), l, pMeta);
435         l.add(e);
436      }
437      return l;
438   }
439
440   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(RDFList list, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws ParseException {
441      int argIndex = 0;
442      for (ExtendedIterator<RDFNode> ni = list.iterator(); ni.hasNext();) {
443         // HTT: isArgs() requires method-argument list ClassMeta; not reachable through public parse() API.
444         E e = (E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), ni.next(), l, pMeta);
445         l.add(e);
446      }
447      return l;
448   }
449
450   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseIntoMap(Resource r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws ParseException {
451      // Add URI as "uri" to generic maps.
452      if (nn(r.getURI())) {
453         var uri = convertAttrToType(m, "uri", keyType);
454         var value = convertAttrToType(m, r.getURI(), valueType);
455         m.put(uri, value);
456      }
457      for (StmtIterator i = r.listProperties(); i.hasNext();) {
458         var st = i.next();
459         var p = st.getPredicate();
460         var key = p.getLocalName();
461         if (! (key.equals("root") && p.getURI().equals(getJuneauNs().getUri()))) {
462            key = decodeString(key);
463            var o = st.getObject();
464            var key2 = convertAttrToType(m, key, keyType);
465            V value = parseAnything(valueType, o, m, pMeta);
466            setName(valueType, value, key);
467            m.put(key2, value);
468         }
469
470      }
471      return m;
472   }
473
474   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
475   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
476
477      // RDFDataMgr.read accepts StringReader; use RDFParser for Reader input
478      var content = pipe.asString();
479      RDFParser.fromString(content, lang)
480         .base("http://unknown/")
481         .parse(model);
482
483      var roots = getRoots(model);
484
485      // Special case where we're parsing a loose collection of resources.
486      if (isLooseCollections() && type.isCollectionOrArray()) {
487         Collection c;
488         // HTT: isArgs() requires method-argument list ClassMeta; not reachable through public parse() API.
489         if (type.isArray() || type.isArgs())
490            c = list();
491         else
492            c = (type.canCreateNewInstance(getOuter()) ? (Collection<?>)type.newInstance(getOuter()) : new JsonList(this));
493
494         var argIndex = new AtomicInteger(0);
495         var c2 = c;
496         // HTT: isArgs() guard — same constraint as above.
497         roots.forEach(x -> c2.add(parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex.getAndIncrement()) : type.getElementType(), x, getOuter(), null)));
498
499         // HTT: isArgs() guard — same constraint as above.
500         if (type.isArray() || type.isArgs())
501            return (T)toArray(type, c);
502         return (T)c;
503      }
504
505      if (roots.isEmpty())
506         return type.isOptional() ? (T)opte() : null;
507
508      if (roots.size() > 1)
509         throw new ParseException(this, "Too many root nodes found in model:  {0}", roots.size());
510      var resource = roots.get(0);
511
512      return parseAnything(type, resource, getOuter(), null);
513   }
514
515   /**
516    * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
517    *
518    * @see RdfParser.Builder#collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
519    * @return
520    *    RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
521    */
522   protected final RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() { return ctx.getCollectionFormat(); }
523
524   /**
525    * All Jena-related configuration properties.
526    *
527    * @return
528    *    A map of all Jena-related configuration properties.
529    */
530   protected final Map<String,Object> getJenaSettings() { return ctx.getJenaSettings(); }
531
532   /**
533    * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
534    *
535    * @see RdfParser.Builder#juneauBpNs(Namespace)
536    * @return
537    *    Default XML namespace for bean properties.
538    */
539   protected final Namespace getJuneauBpNs() { return ctx.getJuneauBpNs(); }
540
541   /**
542    * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
543    *
544    * @see RdfParser.Builder#juneauNs(Namespace)
545    * @return
546    *    XML namespace for Juneau properties.
547    */
548   protected final Namespace getJuneauNs() { return ctx.getJuneauNs(); }
549
550   /**
551    * RDF language.
552    *
553    * @see RdfParser.Builder#language(String)
554    * @return
555    *    The RDF language to use.
556    */
557   protected final String getLanguage() { return ctx.getLanguage(); }
558
559   /**
560    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean.
561    *
562    * @param bm The bean to return the metadata on.
563    * @return The metadata.
564    */
565   protected RdfBeanMeta getRdfBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
566      return ctx.getRdfBeanMeta(bm);
567   }
568
569   /**
570    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
571    *
572    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
573    * @return The metadata.
574    */
575   protected RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
576      return ctx.getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
577   }
578
579   /**
580    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
581    *
582    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
583    * @return The metadata.
584    */
585   protected RdfClassMeta getRdfClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
586      return ctx.getRdfClassMeta(cm);
587   }
588
589   /**
590    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
591    *
592    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
593    * @return The metadata.
594    */
595   protected XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
596      return ctx.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
597   }
598
599   /**
600    * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
601    *
602    * @see RdfParser.Builder#looseCollections()
603    * @return
604    *    <jk>true</jk> if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
605    *    resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
606    */
607   protected final boolean isLooseCollections() { return ctx.isLooseCollections(); }
608
609   /**
610    * Trim whitespace from text elements.
611    *
612    * @see RdfParser.Builder#trimWhitespace()
613    * @return
614    *    <jk>true</jk> if whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.
615    */
616   protected final boolean isTrimWhitespace() { return ctx.isTrimWhitespace(); }
617}
